---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description

**Describe the feature you'd like to see:**
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## Use Case

**Why do you need this feature?**
<!-- Explain the problem or scenario this feature would solve -->

## Proposed Solution

**How would you like this feature implemented?**
<!-- Describe your ideal implementation -->

## Alternatives Considered

**Have you thought of any alternative approaches?**
<!-- Describe any alternatives you've considered -->

## Example Usage

**Show how this feature would be used:**

```bash
# Example command or code
```

## Additional Context

**Any other information that might be helpful?**

- [ ] This relates to performance
- [ ] This is a documentation improvement
- [ ] This involves new protocols/standards
- [ ] This requires new dependencies

## Priority

**How important is this feature?**
- [ ] Low — Nice to have
- [ ] Medium — Would improve functionality
- [ ] High — Critical for use case

---

**Checklist:**
- [ ] I've checked for existing feature requests
- [ ] I've provided a clear use case
- [ ] I've considered alternatives
